name: Employee Onboarding Agent
description: Automates the employee onboarding process — from profile creation and document collection to orientation scheduling and HR notifications.

skills.name: create_employee_profile
skills.description: Create a new employee profile when a candidate is hired

skills.name: send_welcome_email
skills.description: Send a welcome email with first-day schedule to the new employee

skills.name: request_documents
skills.description: Request required documents from the new employee

skills.name: track_documents
skills.description: Check document upload status for an employee

skills.name: update_document_status
skills.description: Mark a specific document as uploaded or pending

skills.name: schedule_orientation
skills.description: Schedule first-day orientation activities (HR orientation, team intro, IT setup, manager meeting)

skills.name: notify_hr
skills.description: Notify HR for account creation and resource preparation, with urgency detection

skills.name: get_onboarding_status
skills.description: Get a comprehensive onboarding status summary for any employee
